footer.description: We are a Vietnam-based manufacturer specializing in premium outdoor furniture for global brands and retailers. With a focus on durability, craftsmanship, and scalable production, we provide OEM/ODM solutions tailored for international markets.
footer.copyright: © 2025 DHT Outdoor Furniture Production. All rights reserved.

seo.title: DHT Outdoor Furniture — Premium Manufacturer & Supplier
seo.description: DHT Outdoor Furniture Production — premium outdoor & indoor furniture manufacturer. Teak, solid wood, custom orders. ISO certified. 25+ export countries.

intro.label: Who We Are
intro.paragraph1: DHT Outdoor Furniture Production is a premium outdoor furniture manufacturer with a 5,000m² production facility in Jakarta. Over 15 years of partnership with hotel brands, resorts, and designers across 25+ countries.
intro.paragraph2: Every product — from teak dining sets to weather-resistant sofas — is crafted by 400+ skilled artisans, undergoing multi-stage quality control.

featured.label: Best Sellers
featured.heading: Best-Selling Outdoor Furniture
featured.description: Manufactured in Vietnam with premium materials — ideal for resorts, villas, and wholesale partners.
featured.noProducts: No featured products in this category yet.

whyUs.label: Why DHT
whyUs.heading: Your Trusted Manufacturing Partner
whyUs.description: From concept sketch to container delivery — we manage every step with precision, transparency, and care.
points: In-house production: no outsourcing, full quality control
Custom sizes, finishes, and OEM / ODM available
Stable capacity for large hospitality & development projects
Experienced export team, on-time delivery record

materials.label: Materials
materials.description: We source only premium-grade natural materials — each selected for its structural integrity, aesthetic warmth, and lasting beauty. FSC-certified timber, sustainably harvested.

solidOak.name: Solid Oak
solidOak.desc: Straight grain, warm honey tones, exceptional durability

walnutWood.name: Walnut Wood
walnutWood.desc: Deep chocolate hues, fine texture, mid-century warmth

premiumTeak.name: Premium Teak
premiumTeak.desc: Natural oils, all-weather resilience, golden brown beauty

linenVelvet.name: Linen & Velvet
linenVelvet.desc: Curated upholstery fabrics in timeless palettes

rooms.label: Inspiration
rooms.heading: Room by Room
rooms.description: Every space tells a story. Discover furniture curated for each room in your home.

quotes.quote: DHT delivered all 200 units on time with exceptional finish quality. Professional and responsive throughout.
quotes.name: James Lim

quotes.quote: We've partnered with DHT for three hospitality projects. Consistent quality and hassle-free logistics.
quotes.name: Sophie Tan

quotes.quote: The custom bedroom sets exceeded expectations. True craftsmanship at a competitive price.
quotes.name: Marco Rossi

cta.heading: Ready to Furnish Your Space?
cta.description: Contact our team for custom quotes, bulk orders, and project consultations. We ship worldwide.

seo.title: About Us — DHT Outdoor Furniture
seo.description: Learn about DHT Outdoor Furniture — 15+ years of furniture manufacturing excellence.

hero.title: About DHT
hero.subtitle: A manufacturer and exporter of outdoor wooden furniture, based in Quy Nhon.

story.label: Our Story
story.heading: From OEM to Global Brand
story.paragraph1: DHT started as an OEM manufacturer. As the market shifted, we decided to take control of our own export journey.
story.paragraph2: It was a challenging process: restructuring production, investing in technology, training our team, and learning to serve global customers.
story.paragraph3: Thanks to perseverance and over 30 years of experience, DHT now exports to more than 20 countries – from the US and Australia to across Europe. "We don't just sell wood – we deliver a story of Vietnamese resilience."

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Strict control from raw material to finished product.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear pricing policy, transparent progress reporting.

dedication.title: Dedication
dedication.desc: Long-term partnership and support for customers.

items.title: Factory Expansion
items.desc: Expanded factories, invested in CNC, UV coating lines, and wood kilns.

items.title: Global Reach
items.desc: Achieved FSC and BSCI certifications, expanded into the US, EU, and Australian markets.

items.title: Strategic Partnerships
items.desc: Aiming to become a strategic partner of international retail chains.

john.quote: DHT has been, is, and will continue striving to deliver greater value to our customers, building lasting trust and carrying the pride of Vietnamese craftsmanship from Quy Nhon to the world.

tyler.quote: At DHT, we don't just build outdoor furniture — we craft spaces where people connect, share stories, and create lasting memories.

dylan.quote: Every project we deliver carries the promise of precision, durability, and the Vietnamese craftsmanship that defines DHT.

david.quote: Innovation means blending timeless teak with modern design to create furniture that stands strong under any sky.

alicia.quote: Strong finances fuel strong partnerships. At DHT, we ensure every order is backed by trust, transparency, and sustainable growth.

stats.heading: Production Figures & Capacity
stats.subtitle: Equipped with state-of-the-art machinery and an expansive 80,000m² facility, we ensure scalability, precision, and reliable fulfillment for global markets.

hr.heading: Human Resources & R&D
hr.prodWorkers: 250 production workers dedicated to consistent quality.
hr.rndModels: 40–50 new models being developed yearly by our R&D team.
